title: feat: encrypt credentials at rest using system keychain
body:
## Context

PR #334 stores platform credentials as plaintext JSON at `~/.config/bop/credentials.json` (0600 permissions). While file permissions restrict access, credentials at rest are not encrypted.

## Proposal

Integrate OS-level secure storage:
- **macOS**: Keychain via `github.com/zalando/go-keyring`
- **Linux**: Secret Service (GNOME Keyring / KDE Wallet) via same library
- **Windows**: Windows Credential Manager via same library
- **Fallback**: Encrypted file storage with a user-derived key if keychain is unavailable

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Credentials stored in OS keychain when available
- [ ] Graceful fallback to encrypted file when keychain unavailable
- [ ] Migration path from plaintext to encrypted storage
- [ ] `bop auth status` shows storage method
